tasks.label: inspect-notifications-columns
args: predictive_maintenance_ai-main\.venv\Scripts\python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'c:\kathir\Final_Year_Project\predictive_maintenance_ai-main'); from database import execute_query; rows=execute_query(\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='notifications' ORDER BY ordinal_position\", fetch=True); print([r['column_name'] for r in rows])"

tasks.label: run-v403-alerts-with-file-check

tasks.label: verify-email-env-safely
args: import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main'); from app.config.settings import EMAIL_CONFIRMATION_ENABLED, EMAIL_CONFIRMATION_VEHICLES, SMTP_ENABLED, SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USERNAME, SMTP_FROM_EMAIL, SMTP_PASSWORD; print({'email_confirmation_enabled': EMAIL_CONFIRMATION_ENABLED, 'email_confirmation_vehicles': sorted(list(EMAIL_CONFIRMATION_VEHICLES)), 'smtp_enabled': SMTP_ENABLED, 'smtp_host': SMTP_HOST, 'smtp_port': SMTP_PORT, 'smtp_username': SMTP_USERNAME, 'smtp_from_email': SMTP_FROM_EMAIL, 'smtp_password_set': bool(SMTP_PASSWORD), 'smtp_password_length': len(SMTP_PASSWORD or '')})

tasks.label: verify-email-env-with-dotenv
args: from dotenv import load_dotenv; import sys; load_dotenv(r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main/.env', override=True); sys.path.insert(0, r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main'); from app.config.settings import EMAIL_CONFIRMATION_ENABLED, EMAIL_CONFIRMATION_VEHICLES, SMTP_ENABLED, SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USERNAME, SMTP_FROM_EMAIL, SMTP_PASSWORD; print({'email_confirmation_enabled': EMAIL_CONFIRMATION_ENABLED, 'email_confirmation_vehicles': sorted(list(EMAIL_CONFIRMATION_VEHICLES)), 'smtp_enabled': SMTP_ENABLED, 'smtp_host': SMTP_HOST, 'smtp_port': SMTP_PORT, 'smtp_username': SMTP_USERNAME, 'smtp_from_email': SMTP_FROM_EMAIL, 'smtp_password_set': bool(SMTP_PASSWORD), 'smtp_password_length': len(SMTP_PASSWORD or '')})

tasks.label: verify-customer-emails-in-db
args: from dotenv import load_dotenv; import sys; load_dotenv(r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main/.env', override=True); sys.path.insert(0, r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main'); from database import execute_query; rows = execute_query("SELECT vehicle_id, owner_email FROM vehicles WHERE owner_email IS NOT NULL AND owner_email <> '' ORDER BY vehicle_id LIMIT 10", fetch=True); print(rows)

tasks.label: smtp-live-safe-check
args: from dotenv import load_dotenv; import sys; load_dotenv(r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main/.env', override=True); sys.path.insert(0, r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main'); from app.services.email_gateway import send_email; result = send_email('kathirveluec@gmail.com', 'SMTP Safety Check', 'This is a one-time SMTP verification test from predictive maintenance backend.'); print({'ok': result.ok, 'provider': result.provider, 'simulated': result.simulated, 'has_message_id': bool(result.message_id), 'error': result.error})

tasks.label: check-ollama-profile-call
args: from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv(r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main/.env', override=True); import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main'); from app.agents.llm_gateway import invoke_with_policy; text, model = invoke_with_policy('Reply with exactly: OLLAMA_OK', profile='customer'); print({'model_used': model, 'response': text[:120]})

tasks.label: check-direct-ollama-call
args: import os; from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv(r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main/.env', override=True); os.environ['AGENT_MODELS_CUSTOMER']='ollama:gemma3:1b'; import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main'); from app.agents.llm_gateway import invoke_with_policy; text, model = invoke_with_policy('Say OK_LOCAL only.', profile='customer'); print({'model_used': model, 'response': text[:120]})

tasks.label: check-ollama-openai-endpoint
args: import json, urllib.request; url='http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1/models'; data=json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=8).read().decode('utf-8')); print({'model_count': len(data.get('data', [])), 'models': [m.get('id') for m in data.get('data', [])[:10]]})

args: import os; from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv(r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main/.env', override=True); os.environ['AGENT_MODELS_CUSTOMER']='ollama:gemma3:1b'; import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main'); from app.agents.llm_gateway import invoke_with_policy; text, model = invoke_with_policy('Reply exactly with OK_LOCAL', profile='customer'); print({'model_used': model, 'response': text[:120]})

tasks.label: check-direct-ollama-client-raw
args: from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv(r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main/.env', override=True); import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main'); from app.agents.llm_gateway import _get_client,_invoke_with_timeout; c=_get_client('ollama:gemma3:1b'); out=_invoke_with_timeout(c,'Reply exactly with OK_LOCAL',30); print({'ok':True,'response':str(out)[:120]})

tasks.label: check-postgres-runtime-status
args: Write-Host 'PORT_5432_LISTENERS'; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5432 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess,State | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Host 'POSTGRES_SERVICES'; Get-Service *postgres* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Status,DisplayName | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Host 'DOCKER_POSTGRES'; docker ps --format "{{.Names}} | {{.Status}} | {{.Ports}}" 2>$null

tasks.label: check-postgres-runtime-status-2
args: Write-Host 'PORT_5432_LISTENERS'; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5432 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess,State | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Host 'POSTGRES_SERVICES'; Get-Service *postgres* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Status,DisplayName | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Host 'DOCKER_PS'; docker ps 2>$null

tasks.label: check-local-postgres-status
args: $services = Get-Service | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'postgres|pgsql' -or $_.DisplayName -match 'PostgreSQL' }; Write-Output 'POSTGRES_SERVICES'; if ($services) { $services | Select-Object Name, Status, DisplayName | Format-Table -Auto | Out-String | Write-Output } else { Write-Output 'NONE' }; Write-Output 'PORT_5432'; try { $listeners = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5432 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop; if ($listeners) { $listeners | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table -Auto | Out-String | Write-Output } else { Write-Output 'No listener on 5432' } } catch { Write-Output 'No listener on 5432' }; Write-Output 'POSTGRES_PROCESSES'; $pg = Get-Process -Name postgres -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($pg) { $pg | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path | Format-Table -Auto | Out-String | Write-Output } else { Write-Output 'No postgres process' }

tasks.label: check-postgres-service-and-port-cmd
args: echo ---SERVICES--- && sc query type= service state= all | findstr /I /C:"postgres" /C:"pgsql" && echo ---PORT5432--- && netstat -ano | findstr :5432

tasks.label: start-local-postgres-17
args: echo ---STATUS_BEFORE--- && sc query postgresql-x64-17 && echo ---START_ATTEMPT--- && sc start postgresql-x64-17 && timeout /t 2 > nul && echo ---STATUS_AFTER--- && sc query postgresql-x64-17 && echo ---PORT5432_AFTER--- && netstat -ano | findstr :5432

tasks.label: inspect-postgres-service-details
args: echo ---SERVICE_CONFIG--- && sc qc postgresql-x64-17 && echo ---SERVICE_STATUS--- && sc query postgresql-x64-17 && echo ---BINARY_CHECK--- && for %I in ("C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin\pg_ctl.exe") do @echo %~fI && if exist "C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin\pg_ctl.exe" ("C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin\pg_ctl.exe" --version) else (echo pg_ctl_not_found)

tasks.label: inspect-postgres-log-files
args: echo ---DATA_DIR_EXISTS--- && if exist "C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\data" (echo yes) else (echo no) && echo ---DATA_DIR_CONTENT--- && dir /b "C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\data" && echo ---LOG_DIR_CONTENT--- && dir /b "C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\data\log"

tasks.label: generate-postgres-diagnostic-report
args: $report=[ordered]@{}; $report.generatedAt=(Get-Date).ToString('s'); $report.serviceQuery=(sc.exe query postgresql-x64-17 | Out-String); $report.serviceConfig=(sc.exe qc postgresql-x64-17 | Out-String); $report.port5432=((netstat -ano | Select-String ':5432' | ForEach-Object {$_.Line}) -join "`n"); $logDir='C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\data\log'; $report.logDir=$logDir; $report.logDirExists=Test-Path $logDir; if ($report.logDirExists) { $files=Get-ChildItem $logDir -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 5 Name,LastWriteTime,Length; $report.logFiles=$files; if ($files.Count -gt 0) { $latest=Join-Path $logDir $files[0].Name; $report.latestLog=$latest; $report.latestLogTail=(Get-Content $latest -Tail 120 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue); } }; $out='c:\kathir\Final_Year_Project\predictive_maintenance_ai-main\postgres_diag_report.json'; $report | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content $out -Encoding UTF8; Write-Output "REPORT_PATH=$out"

tasks.label: capture-postgres-diagnostics-to-file
args: (echo ====SC_QUERY==== & sc query postgresql-x64-17 & echo ====SC_QC==== & sc qc postgresql-x64-17 & echo ====NETSTAT_5432==== & netstat -ano | findstr :5432 & echo ====DATA_DIR==== & dir /b "C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\data" & echo ====LOG_DIR==== & dir /b "C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\data\log") > "c:\kathir\Final_Year_Project\predictive_maintenance_ai-main\postgres_diag_report.txt" 2>&1 & echo DONE

tasks.label: verify-app-db-connectivity
args: from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv(r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main/.env', override=True); import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'c:/kathir/Final_Year_Project/predictive_maintenance_ai-main'); from database import execute_query; rows=execute_query('SELECT current_database() AS db, current_user AS user_name, now() AS server_time', fetch=True); print(rows)
